name: gagent-phase3-playwright-agent
description: GAgent Phase 3 controlled UX friction dataset generator

scripts.pilot: cross-env GAGENT_RUN_MODE=pilot GAGENT_REPEATS=4 GAGENT_VIEWPORTS=desktop,tablet,mobile GAGENT_NETWORKS=fast,normal,slow node node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/phase3-dataset.spec.js
scripts.pilot:small: cross-env GAGENT_RUN_MODE=pilot GAGENT_REPEATS=1 GAGENT_VIEWPORTS=desktop GAGENT_NETWORKS=normal node node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/phase3-dataset.spec.js
scripts.final: cross-env GAGENT_RUN_MODE=final GAGENT_REPEATS=105 GAGENT_VIEWPORTS=desktop,tablet,mobile GAGENT_NETWORKS=fast,normal,slow node node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/phase3-dataset.spec.js
